meta.title: Tales of Bloomrise
meta.description: Explore dungeons and protect your village in Tales of Bloomrise, a Brazilian pixel-art RPG. Download it on Google Play and join our Discord community!
meta.ogDescription: Explore dungeons and protect your village in Tales of Bloomrise, a Brazilian pixel-art RPG. Play now!

lang.label: Language
lang.modalSubtitle: Select a language to continue. You can change it later in the footer.

hero.subtitle: Explore dungeons, protect your village, and live a pixel-art adventure.
hero.highlight2: Dungeons, village life, and long-term progression
hero.highlight3: Frequent updates shaped by community feedback

metric.thanks: Thanks for supporting Tales of Bloomrise! 💚

about.title: About the Game
about.description1: Tales of Bloomrise is a Brazilian pixel-art RPG that blends dungeon exploration with life in a village full of unique characters. You play as Rayy, an adventurer who protects Bloomrise and uncovers secrets hidden in nearby ruins.
about.description2: By combining combat, puzzles, and NPC relationships, the game delivers a nostalgic and immersive experience for fans of Stardew Valley and classic Zelda.
about.updateText:
Patch notes are now published on our Discord and Steam Community.

Join Discord | Open Steam Community

item1.title: 🌱 Farming & Crafting
item1.text: Plant rare ingredients and craft your own equipment.

item2.title: ⚔️ Dynamic Combat
item2.text: Fight monsters with different weapons and abilities.

item3.title: 🏰 Endless Dungeons
item3.text: Explore procedurally generated dungeons. No two adventures are the same!

item4.title: 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Living Village
item4.text: Meet and interact with 10+ unique NPCs, each with their own story.

item5.title: 🌍 Open World
item5.text: Explore the village, forests, caves, and Bloomrise beach.

item6.title: 📜 Story & Secrets
item6.text: Uncover Bloomrise's story and discover secrets hidden in ancient ruins.

community.title: Join the Community
community.text: Join our Discord to get first-hand news, share suggestions, and chat with other adventurers!
community.item1: 💬 Talk with the dev and other players

gallery.title: Screenshot Gallery
gallery.intro: Gameplay moments, exploration, and village life. Click to enlarge.

developer.title: A Message from the Dev
developer.text1: Hi! I'm José Minelli, the creator of Tales of Bloomrise. As a Brazilian indie developer, I'm dedicated to bringing you the best experience possible.
developer.text2: The game is constantly evolving, and community feedback is essential for its future. Thanks for playing, and I hope you enjoy the adventure. See you on Discord!

copyright.title: Art Copyright
copyright.main: All artwork, graphics, sprites, and visual assets in Tales of Bloomrise are protected by copyright.
copyright.allowed: ✓ Allowed: Share, reproduce, and create videos of the game for demonstration, analysis, and entertainment purposes.
copyright.not_allowed: ✗ NOT allowed: Use the artwork, sprites, or assets in other games, commercial projects, or educational projects without explicit permission from the creator.
copyright.contact: To request permission to use the assets, contact us through Discord.
